name: POSEIDON
author: GeneralDussDuss
description: Commander of the Deep — keyboard-first pentesting firmware for M5Stack Cardputer-Adv. 96+ features across WiFi / BLE / sub-GHz / 2.4 GHz / LoRa / IR / RJ45. SaltyJack LAN arsenal (DHCP starve, Responder, WPAD, on-device NTLMv2 cracker). MIMIR drop-box control. TRIDENT PC bridge.

firmware.name: POSEIDON v0.4.0
firmware.description: Full factory image. Deauth actually lands on-air (ieee80211_raw_frame_sanity_check override). NimBLE 2.x migration. SaltyJack LAN suite featured.
